- Users are strongly advised to carefully review and validate them before execution.

- The ACME team does not accept responsibility for any errors, damages, losses, or failure to meet legal or regulatory requirements arising from their use.
- By using these test cases, you acknowledge and agree that all risks and impacts of execution lie solely with you as the user.
- No legal claims, actions, or proceedings may be initiated against the ACME team in connection with any loss or damage resulting from the use of these test cases.

item.name: VTC 1 - Broken Object Level Authorization - Valid Token, Unauthorized patientId
VTC 2 - Broken Object Level Authorization - Invalid Token
VTC 3 - Security Misconfiguration - Missing Authentication Header

body.raw:
{
  "patientId": "{{patient_id}}",
  "patientName": "Charlie Brown",
  "gender": "male",
  "dateOfBirth": "1980-12-12",
  "bloodGroup": "B+",

item.name: VTC 4 - Security Misconfiguration - Content-Type Header Manipulation
VTC 7 - Edge Case - Large Numbers and Strings

item.name: VTC 8 - Edge Case - Negative and Zero Values

body.raw:
{
  "patientId": "PNEG123",
  "patientName": "Negative Nancy",
  "gender": "female",
  "dateOfBirth": "1970-01-01",
  "bloodGroup": "A-",

item.name: VTC 9 - Edge Case - Special Characters & Script Injection

body.raw: { "patientId": "", "patientName": "O'Reilly \"Test\" \u003cimg src=x onerror=alert('xss')\u003e", "gender": "male", "dateOfBirth": "2024-01-01", "bloodGroup": "A+", "doctorId": "doc", "doctorName": "Dr. ", "department": "General & Emergency", "reportDate": "2024-06-23", "reportType": "Injection\nType", "diagnosisSummary": "DROP TABLE report; --", "weight": 70, "height": 170, "pulseRate": 80, "bloodPressureSystolic": 120, "bloodPressureDiastolic": 80, "bodyTemperature": 36.5, "prescribedMedications": "well & sleep", "createdAt": "2024-06-23T12:00:00Z", "updatedAt": "2024-06-23T12:00:00Z" }
